desc: Resolve all remaining TypeScript compilation errors (17 total) across completion-evidence, evidence, mining, protocol, and roadmap modules. Fix missing types, export issues, and type mismatches.

fix-completion-enforcer-types.desc: Fix 9 CompletionRecord type errors in completion-enforcer.ts. Replace with CompletionRecordWithEvidence or define CompletionRecord type. All uses are in functions expecting completion records.

fix-protocol-orientation-export.desc: Add missing Orientation export to src/lib/protocol/types.ts. batch-invariants.ts imports it but it's not exported.

fix-batch-invariants-generics.desc: Fix generic type T in batch-invariants.ts line 155. Define or remove the undefined generic parameter.

validate.cmd: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'Cannot find name' | grep -c T || echo 0

fix-artifact-gates-integration.desc: Add missing 'desc' property to node spec in artifact-gates-integration.ts line 232. Node requires both id and desc fields.

fix-headsha-recovery-type.desc: Fix type error in headsha-recovery.ts line 126. Boolean field assignment with string|boolean|undefined value. Use type guard or null coalescing.

fix-anomaly-detector-property.desc: Fix missing 'endIdx' property in anomaly-detector.ts line 389. Object type has startIdx and resyncCount but code expects endIdx.

fix-mock-dag-switcher-imports.desc: Fix missing module import in mock-dag-switcher.ts. '../../protocol.ts' cannot be found. Check correct import path for protocol module.

fix-roadmap-json-render.desc: Fix render assignment in bin/roadmap.ts line 7100. RenderV1 type now requires 'content' property but assignment creates object without it.

typescript-validation-complete.desc: Final validation: all TypeScript errors resolved. Run npx tsc --noEmit with zero errors.

validate.cmd: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | wc -l | awk '{if($1==0) exit 0; else exit 1}'
